_comment: Tests the safety-critical input_rewrite degradation. This hook sanitizes shell command arguments via updated_input in its JSON output. When converted to a provider that does not support input_rewrite, the default degradation strategy is 'block' — the converted hook MUST block the action entirely (exit code 2) rather than allowing unmodified input through. This prevents a false sense of security where the user believes input is being sanitized when it is not.
